blocks.alt: Jonathan steps out of Mr. Tanaka's car

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: That's right. You do.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: No. But you will be.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: There isn't. Go.
He pulled away the second I closed the door. He always does that.
I was still standing there when Tanaka's car came up the lane.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Yo.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Yo.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You been out here this whole time?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Like two minutes.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh you look like you been standing here since 7am.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I'm just standing here.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Yeah. That's exactly what I mean.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: How are you already calm? It's the first day.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Cause there's nothing to be nervous about bruh. It's school. Chill.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You sound like Mr. Cole.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Mr. Cole stay speaking facts ngl.
Two juniors appeared beside him before he finished that sentence. I don't know where they came from.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aye — this is my boy Larry. We go way back. He straight.

blocks.speaker: Junior
blocks.content: What's good Larry.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Come on, let's go.

blocks.prompt: Jonathan is already moving with them.

options.label: Let him go. Find class yourself.
